mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESTAURANT_TBL (member_id, rest_name, rest_addr, lat, lng, category, phone, hours, rest_content, rest_thumb, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{restName}, #{restAddr}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{category}, #{phone}, #{hours}, #{restContent}, #{restThumb}, current_timestamp())
mapper.select:
SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.ai_review, r.rest_content, r.lat, r.lng, r.phone, r.hours, r.rating_sum, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg, m.member_id,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_REPORT_TBL rr WHERE rr.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rr.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_report
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r INNER JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.rest_no = #{restNo} AND r.rest_status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM REVIEW_TBL r INNER JOIN REVIEW_TAGS_TBL rt ON r.review_no = rt.review_no WHERE rest_no = #{restNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW_TBL r INNER JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE rest_no = #{restNo} AND review_status = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW_TBL (member_id, rest_no, review_content, rating, visit_date) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{restNo}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating}, #{reviewVisit})
mapper.select:
SELECT rt.rest_no, rt.rest_name, rt.rest_addr, m.member_thumb, m.member_name, m.member_id, r.review_content, r.visit_date AS review_visit, r.rating,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REVIEW_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.member_id = #{memberId} AND rl.review_no = r.review_no ) AS is_liked
FROM REVIEW_TBL r INNER JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON r.member_id = m.member_id
INNER JOIN RESTAURANT_TBL rt ON r.rest_no = rt.rest_no
WHERE r.review_no = #{reviewNo} AND r.review_status = 0

SELECT c.comment_no, c.member_id, m.member_name AS writerName, m.member_thumb, c.content, c.created_at, c.depth, c.parent_comment
FROM REVIEW_COMMENT_TBL c INNER JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.review_no = #{reviewNo} AND c.com_status = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_comment, c.comment_no), c.depth, c.comment_no

SELECT c.comment_no, c.member_id, m.member_name AS writerName, m.member_thumb, c.content, c.created_at, c.depth, c.parent_comment
FROM REVIEW_COMMENT_TBL c INNER JOIN MEMBER_TBL m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.comment_no = #{commentNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW_COMMENT_TBL (review_no, member_id, parent_comment, depth, content) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{req.memberId}, #{req.parentComment}, #{req.depth}, #{req.content})
mapper.select:
SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
ORDER BY rating_avg DESC, r.review_total_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg, TRUE AS is_like
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r INNER JOIN REST_LIKE_TBL rl ON r.rest_no = rl.rest_no WHERE rl.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.review_total_count, ROUND(r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like,
( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * COS(RADIANS(lat)) * COS(RADIANS(lng) - RADIANS(#{coords.lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(lat)) ) ) AS distance_km
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
WHERE ( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * COS(RADIANS(r.lat)) * COS(RADIANS(r.lng) - RADIANS(#{coords.lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{coords.lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(r.lat)) ) ) <= 10
ORDER BY distance_km ASC
SELECT r.* FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r INNER JOIN REST_LIKE_TBL l ON r.rest_no = l.rest_no WHERE l.member_id = #{memberId} AND r.rest_status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, COUNT(l.member_id) AS like_count FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r LEFT JOIN REST_LIKE_TBL l ON r.rest_no = l.rest_no WHERE r.rest_status = 'NORMAL' GROUP BY r.rest_no ORDER BY like_count DESC, r.rating_sum DESC, r.rest_no DESC LIMIT 12
SELECT * FROM RESTAURANT_TBL WHERE rest_status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY rest_no DESC
SELECT r.rest_no AS restNo, r.rest_name AS restName, r.lat AS restLat, r.lng AS restLng FROM REST_LIKE_TBL l INNER JOIN RESTAURANT_TBL r ON l.rest_no = r.rest_no WHERE l.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT DISTINCT r.rest_no AS restNo, r.rest_name AS restName, r.lat AS restLat, r.lng AS restLng FROM REVIEW_TBL rv INNER JOIN RESTAURANT_TBL r ON rv.rest_no = r.rest_no WHERE rv.member_id = #{memberId} AND rv.review_status = 0

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.review_total_count, ROUND( r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
r.rest_addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.region}, '%')
AND r.category IN
#{category}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
ORDER BY rating_avg DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
ORDER BY r.review_total_count DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
r.rest_addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.region}, '%')
AND r.category IN
#{category}

SELECT r.rest_no, r.rest_name, r.rest_thumb, r.rest_addr, r.category, r.review_total_count,
ROUND( r.rating_sum * 1.0 / NULLIF(r.review_total_count, 0), 1 ) AS rating_avg,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REST_LIKE_TBL rl WHERE rl.rest_no = r.rest_no AND rl.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_like
FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
r.rest_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.restName}, '%')
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r
r.rest_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.restName}, '%')

SELECT r.rest_no FROM RESTAURANT_TBL r WHERE r.rest_name = #{storeName} AND ( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(r.lat)) * COS(RADIANS(r.lng) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(r.lat)) ) ) <= 0.1
mapper.update: UPDATE RESTAURANT_TBL SET rating_sum = rating_sum + #{rating}, review_total_count = review_total_count + 1 WHERE rest_no = #{restNo}
mapper.select: SELECT image_url FROM review_images_tbl WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}
SELECT image_url FROM review_images_tbl WHERE review_no IN (SELECT review_no FROM review_tbl WHERE rest_no = #{restNo})
